title: Mina and the Missing Moon Lantern

scenes.title: The Schoolyard Search
scenes.text: At Moonbell School, everyone waits for the Moon Lantern Festival. But the special lantern has disappeared. Mina notices tiny silver footprints near the garden gate.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Ask Teacher Nora for clues
choice_labels.Hide: 🙈 Hide — Sneak to the garden gate
choice_labels.Key: 🗝️ Key — Check the lost and found box

scenes.title: Teacher Nora’s Clue
scenes.text: Teacher Nora says, “The lantern was last seen in the library. A good detective listens before accusing.” Mina writes this in her notebook.

scenes.title: The Whispering Classmates
scenes.text: One child saw a blue feather. Another heard a squeaky cart. A third saw light near the old theater room.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Ask Mr. Bell the janitor
choice_labels.Hide: 🙈 Hide — Slip into the theater hall

scenes.title: The Lost and Found Box
scenes.text: Inside the lost and found box, Mina discovers a tiny brass key and a ribbon with glitter on it.

choice_labels.Key: 🗝️ Key — Try the brass key in the library
choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Follow the trail to the garden

scenes.title: The Garden Gate
scenes.text: The garden gate is open. A path of silver dust leads toward the greenhouse. Mina hears something rustle behind the flowers.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Greet Pip the little mouse
choice_labels.Hide: 🙈 Hide — Watch quietly in the garden

scenes.title: Watching Quietly
scenes.text: Mina waits quietly. A tiny mouse appears, pulling a piece of shiny ribbon. It runs toward the greenhouse.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Go straight to the greenhouse

scenes.title: Pip the Mouse
scenes.text: Mina kneels and whispers, “I won’t hurt you.” The mouse points at the greenhouse and squeaks three times.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Follow Pip to the greenhouse
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Ask Mr. Bell about his cart

scenes.title: Mr. Bell’s Cart
scenes.text: Mr. Bell shows Mina his squeaky cart. “I moved chairs to the theater, but I never touched the lantern.” Mina sees silver dust on the wheel.

scenes.title: The Quiet Library
scenes.text: The library smells like paper and cinnamon. The lantern’s empty hook hangs by the window. A locked drawer sits under the librarian’s desk.

scenes.title: The Librarian’s Memory
scenes.text: The librarian remembers a student carrying art supplies near the theater. “The lantern was glowing faintly, like it wanted to follow someone.”

scenes.title: The Locked Drawer
scenes.text: The brass key opens the drawer. Inside is a festival schedule and a note: “Lantern light reacts to kindness.”

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Go to the theater hall
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Tell Teacher Nora what you found

scenes.title: The Greenhouse
scenes.text: In the greenhouse, moonflowers bloom early. Their petals glow with the same silver dust found on the cart.

choice_labels.Run: 🏃 Run — Head to the theater hall
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Follow Pip the mouse again

scenes.title: The Old Theater Hall
scenes.text: The theater hall is dark except for a soft glow behind the stage curtain. Mina hears whispering and a small hiccup.

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Call out with a gentle voice
choice_labels.Sword: ⚔️ Sword — Accuse Mr. Bell too quickly

scenes.title: A Wrong Accusation
scenes.text: Mina points at Mr. Bell too quickly. Everyone becomes quiet. Mina realizes detectives must use evidence, not guesses.

scenes.title: A Detective Apologizes
scenes.text: Mina apologizes. Mr. Bell smiles gently. “That is how real detectives learn.” He helps her check behind the curtain.

choice_labels.Hide: 🙈 Hide — Peek behind the stage curtain

scenes.title: A Gentle Voice
scenes.text: Mina says, “Whoever is there, I can help.” A small voice replies, “I only wanted to fix it before anyone noticed.”

choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Step out and offer help

scenes.title: Behind the Curtain
scenes.text: Behind the curtain sits Lio, the shyest student in class. The Moon Lantern is beside him, cracked but still glowing.

scenes.title: Comforting Lio
scenes.text: Mina tells Lio, “Mistakes become smaller when we tell the truth.” Lio nods and offers the missing glass star from his pocket.

choice_labels.Magic: ✨ Magic — Fix the lantern with the glass star
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Bring Teacher Nora to help

scenes.title: Repairing the Lantern
scenes.text: Mina uses the glass star and the glitter ribbon to repair the lantern. The moonflowers glow, and the lantern shines brighter than ever.

choice_labels.Open Door: 🚪 Open Door — Start the festival together
choice_labels.Talk: 💬 Talk — Encourage Lio to tell the truth

scenes.title: Golden Ending
scenes.text: Mina helps Lio explain everything. The class forgives him, and together they hang the Moon Lantern. The festival begins under silver light.

scenes.title: Kind Ending
scenes.text: Lio tells the truth before the lantern is fully fixed. The class repairs it together. The festival starts late, but everyone feels proud.
